title: Exporting to Excel while including a table that has been "Sorted"

posts.author: mdcollison1 (Matt Collison)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Here’s what’s happening: when exporting a board to Excel, only the table view and saved filters (basic/advanced) are included.

“Group by,” “Sort,” and conditional coloring aren’t supported in the export, so the Excel file won’t preserve your sorting method or any group-by arrangement.

What are you trying to achieve

We need to allow an Export to Excel to include the “Sort” function and any other function that may be listed above.
